description: I am a Software Analysis and Development student who loves the tech industry. I am currently learning and creating projects to improve my skills and enter the world of programming. I am excited for the opportunity to work and continue learning about this vast and beautiful world.

workDescription: I'm currently studying 'Software Analysis and Development' while improving my programming skills. I don't have any professional experience yet but I have 6 months of experience building personal projects with HTML, CSS, JS, TS, React, Tailwind and NextJS which you can see on the previous page.
